Metadata.title: Dowin
Metadata.description: Focus on your most important goals.

Common.noScoreboardNotice: No active scoreboard. Please create a scoreboard first.

Dashboard.openInNewTabHint: Click to open in a new tab
Dashboard.teamWeeklyScoreboardDesc: Shows action item execution for all team members in the selected week.

Dashboard.weekViewDesc: Shows the week (Mon-Sun) containing the selected date.

Celebration.allSuccess: 100% achieved for all action items this week!
Celebration.singleSuccessFallback: 100% achieved for an action item this week!

Guide.changeProposalDesc: No records for 2 consecutive weeks. Try changing this action item.
Guide.adjustProposalDesc: Less than 50% for 2 consecutive weeks. Try lowering the target a bit.

header.activeTitle: This week, {winningCount} of {activeCount} active members are winning.
header.noActiveTitle: No active scoreboards yet, so team win/loss cannot be calculated.
header.needsCheckDesc: {notStartedCount} members have not started and {noScoreboardCount} members have no scoreboard. Check them first.
header.allStartedDesc: Everyone has started logging this week. Continue into the team dashboard for action item details.

winRate.title: This Week's Win Rate
winRate.desc: Breaks down team status this week based on active scoreboards.

trend.title: Team Win Rate Trend
trend.desc: Actual team win rate and execution rate by recent week.
trend.winRateDesc: The share of active-scoreboard members who are ahead of this week's target pace.
trend.executionRateDesc: The share of active-scoreboard members who logged at least one action item this week.

headline.noActive: No active scoreboards are available for this week's win rate.

subline.noScoreboard: Start by helping {noScoreboardCount} members set up scoreboards.
subline.notStarted: Check the {notStartedCount} members who have not started this week.
subline.losing: Review the execution rhythm for {losingCount} members who are behind.
subline.stable: This week's flow is stable among active scoreboards.

focus.title: Members to Check First
focus.emptyTitle: No members need immediate attention this week.
focus.emptyDesc: Use the team dashboard to review lead-measure details.

action.noScoreboard: Help set up their Wildly Important Goal and lead measures
action.notStarted: Confirm the smallest action they can start this week
action.losingStarted: Check lead-measure difficulty or execution rhythm

empty.noMembersTitle: No team members to show in this report yet.
empty.noMembersDesc: Once members join the workspace, the weekly report will summarize team status.
empty.noActiveScoreboardsDesc: When members create scoreboards, win rate and execution flow can be calculated.
empty.noTrendDesc: Recent weekly trends will appear after the team creates scoreboards and starts logging.

cta.title: Need more detail?
cta.desc: Continue into the team dashboard to review lead-measure flow.

Setup.description: Set a single goal and define your measures.

guide.title: Measure Setup Guide
guide.lagDesc: The final target value you want to achieve. (e.g., Close 5 new contracts in Q3)
guide.leadDesc: Repeatable actions you can control to reach your goal. (e.g., 3 prospect meetings per week)

Setup.lagMeasureDesc: The specific outcome you want to achieve.
Setup.leadMeasureDesc: Weekly behaviors that will drive the success criteria.
Setup.confirmArchive: Do you want to archive this scoreboard?
Setup.goalQuestion: What is your most important goal?
Setup.lagMeasureQuestion: How will you measure success? (X → Y)
Setup.lagTip1Text: Are the start (X) and target (Y) points clear?
Setup.lagTip2Text: Does it represent final goal achievement?
Setup.leadMeasureQuestion: What repeatable actions will you take for success?
Setup.leadMeasurePlaceholder: e.g., Run 4 times a week for 30 min
Setup.leadTip1Text: Does this action improve the success criteria?
Setup.leadTip2Text: Is it an action you can directly control?
Setup.archivedMeasuresDesc: These stay in your history but are excluded from the current scoreboard.
Setup.deleteTagConfirm: Do you want to delete this tag?
Setup.deleteConfirmTitle: The following action items will be deleted:
Setup.deleteConfirmWarning: Deleting them will also delete all existing execution records and cannot be recovered. Do you want to proceed?
Setup.tagLimit: You can add up to {n} tags for classification.
Setup.newTagPlaceholder: Add tag (e.g., Morning routine, max {n} chars)
Setup.deleteTagConfirmExtended: Do you want to delete this tag? It will be removed from all associated measures.

Coachmark.goalContent: A good primary goal is about choosing what matters most. Too many goals reduce focus. Set only one for this period.
Coachmark.lagContent: Success criteria show the final result. Write a measurable criterion for your primary goal in the form 'X to Y by date'.
Coachmark.leadContent: Action items are repeatable actions that change the result. They must be influenceable. Write daily or weekly recurring actions.
Coachmark.tagsContent: Create and attach tags here to categorize similar actions. These tags will also be shown on your dashboard.

Toast.tagLimitReached: You can only select up to {n} tags.
Toast.tagNameTooLong: Tag name must be {n} characters or less.
Toast.fillRequiredFields: Please enter a primary goal, success criteria, and at least one action item.
Toast.archiveSuccess: Scoreboard archived. You can now create a new one.
Toast.duplicatedTag: A tag with the same name already exists.

WorkspaceOverLimit.memberDescApp: This workspace is over its {limit}-seat limit, so some features are currently limited. Contact a workspace admin for the required adjustments.

ProfileBilling.pendingDesc: Right after checkout, it can take a moment for the webhook to update your workspace. Refresh in a moment to check the latest status.
ProfileBilling.actionsAdminDesc: Workspace admins can review the Basic subscription and billing management state here.
ProfileBilling.actionsMemberDesc: You can view the current plan and billing status, but only workspace admins can manage billing.
ProfileBilling.downgradePolicyDesc: Because Basic provides operations access immediately after payment, already-paid periods are generally non-refundable. If cancellation is scheduled, workspace and seat access remain available until the current period ends, and future billing stops after that period.
ProfileBilling.betaPromotionalGrantNotice: Basic promotion benefits are currently applied.
ProfileBilling.nonPolarEntitlementNotice: You're currently using Basic features through {source}. If you need to change or cancel your subscription, please <contact>contact support</contact>.
ProfileBilling.memberNotice: Changing payment methods, canceling, and re-subscribing are currently limited to workspace admins.
ProfileBilling.checkoutNoticeDesc: Please review the price, billing cycle, auto-renewal, cancellation, and refund terms before starting the Basic subscription. Repeated refunds, malicious payments, suspected fraud, or abuse may lead to manual review or refusal of future transactions.
ProfileBilling.renewalValue: Charged automatically each billing period until canceled
ProfileBilling.cancelMethodValue: Cancel from the billing screen or customer portal
ProfileBilling.businessInfo: Seller information: Dasoslab, Representative Hanbee Seo, Business Registration No. 596-12-02628, 4F, 8, Dongtanjungsimsangga 2-gil, Hwaseong-si, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea
ProfileBilling.refundSummary: Because Basic provides access to the workspace dashboard and operations features immediately after payment, already-paid periods are generally non-refundable. General cancellation stops future billing after the current period ends. Legal rights, duplicate payments, obvious mistaken charges, or technical failures right after payment are reviewed as exceptions.
ProfileBilling.supportSummary: Questions about billing, cancellation, or refunds may be submitted to support@dowin.app or through the contact path.
ProfileBilling.standardDesc: Basic subscription enables workspace and seat-based team operations.
ProfileBilling.standardFeature1: CSV export for meeting materials and operational reporting
ProfileBilling.standardFeature2: Longer history for records and reports than the free plan
ProfileBilling.standardFeature3: Expanded features for leader intervention and tighter team operations

ProfileBilling.pendingSeatValueNoDate: {count} members from the next billing cycle
ProfileBilling.seatChangePolicyTooltip:
You can only reduce the member limit to the number of members still in the workspace or higher.

Example: to reduce from 10 to 5, remove members until 5 remain, then change the limit to 5.

Lower limits apply from the next billing cycle. Higher limits apply after the billing status is updated.
ProfileBilling.seatChangeErrorLowerThanCurrent: There are {current} members still in the workspace, so the limit cannot be reduced to {requested}. Remove at least {removeCount} members first, then try again.
ProfileBilling.seatChangeSuccess: Change request received. Lower limits apply from the next billing cycle; higher limits apply after the billing status is updated.
ProfileBilling.seatChangeFailed: An error occurred while processing the request.

ProductUpdates.latestDesc: Quickly browse what's new and try them out.

2026-07-17-team-nudge-poke.title: You can now send a Poke notification to your teammates
2026-07-17-team-nudge-poke.summary: If you notice a team member who has forgotten or delayed their updates, poke them from the dashboard to send a quick reminder push notification.

2026-07-07-action-item-trend.title: See your action item trends at a glance
2026-07-07-action-item-trend.summary: We've added a trend indicator to the dashboard so you can easily see how your action items compare to last week.

2026-06-29-workspace-past-week-edit.title: Control past week record editing from workspace settings
2026-06-29-workspace-past-week-edit.summary: You can now manage whether members can edit past week's records directly in the workspace settings to fit your team's workflow.

2026-06-18-team-check-in.title: Team Check-in feature has been added
2026-06-18-team-check-in.summary: Share your status and progress more easily by running check-ins with your team members.

2026-06-13-dark-mode.title: Eye-friendly dark mode is now available
2026-06-13-dark-mode.summary: Dark mode is now supported for a comfortable experience in dark environments. It applies automatically based on your system settings.

2026-04-14-personal-reminder-schedule.title: Customize your personal record reminder time
2026-04-14-personal-reminder-schedule.summary: You can now receive daily record reminder push notifications at a time that fits your lifestyle from the profile notification settings.

2026-04-14-lead-measure-tags.title: Organize lead measures more systematically with tags
2026-04-14-lead-measure-tags.summary: Create tags in the settings and attach them to lead measures to easily distinguish behavior categories on your dashboard.

2026-03-25-team-dashboard-memos.title: Leave meeting memos directly on the team dashboard
2026-03-25-team-dashboard-memos.summary: You can now write down and check memos or action items next to each team member's weekly scoreboard during Dowin meetings.

2026-03-22-team-dashboard-me-highlight.title: Find your card faster on the team dashboard
2026-03-22-team-dashboard-me-highlight.summary: Your card is now sorted at the top of the team member list and clearly distinguished with a border and 'Me' badge.

2026-03-18-dashboard-export.title: Download your records as CSV
2026-03-18-dashboard-export.summary: When you need to review or share, you can pick a period and lead measures to save them immediately.

2026-03-16-dashboard-period-navigation.title: View past weekly and monthly records more easily
2026-03-16-dashboard-period-navigation.summary: You can now navigate between weekly and monthly views to check trends based on any date you want.

new.title: Create New Workspace
new.description:
Set a workspace name and choose how many seats you need for your team — then you'll be taken to Basic checkout.

You're billed monthly based on your seat count and charged automatically each cycle until you cancel. If you cancel, your workspace and seat access stay active until the end of the current billing period.
new.label: Workspace Name
new.seatAutoApplied: Max seats from promotion automatically applied.
new.checkoutCompleteDescription: We are confirming Basic payment and creating your workspace.
new.checkoutMissing: Workspace checkout information is missing. Please try again.

join.title: Join with Invite Code
join.description: Enter the invitation code received from your team admin.
join.planInfo: Members can join up to the number of purchased workspace seats.
join.label: Invite Code
join.joinFailed: An error occurred while joining the workspace.

Hero.headline:
Are you really focusing on
what matters most right now?

Problem.title:
Working hard,
but why aren't there results?
Problem.item1Body: Everything is important. We worked busily, but it feels like we missed the most important thing.
Problem.item2Title: Working hard, but drifting from the goal
Problem.item2Body: Working frantically, sometimes we end up doing things far from the actual goal.
Problem.item3Title: Not sure what to actually do to reach the goal
Problem.item3Body: The goal is set, but it's hard to figure out what specific actions to take every day to actually get there.
Problem.item4Title: Not sure if we're doing well
Problem.item4Body: We know the team is working hard. But it's hard to judge whether things are actually going well.

Solution.title:
Focus on one most important goal
and make real results every week
Solution.item1Title: Keep only one most important goal
Solution.item1Body: Decide the one thing to do first right now. Narrowing the goal clearly shows the current progress and problems to solve.
Solution.item2Body: Agree on what 'well done' means with numbers. Discussing with numbers, not feelings, makes feedback fast and clear.
Solution.item3Title: Break the goal into executable actions for today
Solution.item3Body: Teammates clearly divide what to do this week.
Solution.item4Body: See overall goal progress and individual action execution rates on one screen. You can spot delayed items even before the meeting.

Loop.title: Execution loop that drives results
Loop.node1Desc:
The most important goal
the team must achieve
Loop.node2Desc:
Specific action items
to achieve the goal

Pricing.title: Just one plan
Pricing.body: Start by paying only for the number of your team members.
Pricing.feature1: Unlimited goal and action item management
Pricing.feature2: Personalized daily action tracking and reminders
Pricing.feature3: Real-time team execution scoreboard and dashboard

FinalCta.title:
Shall we focus on
what matters most?
FinalCta.body: Start the most reliable execution loop that drives results right now.

Footer.headline:
Now it's time to focus
on what matters most
Footer.description: Primary goal, success criteria, action items. Dowin connects your team's execution into a single flow.

ContactPage.title: Leave your inquiry here
ContactPage.description:
You can submit billing, account, or product issues directly inside the service.
Submitted inquiries are forwarded to the operations team, and follow-up replies are sent to the email address you provide.
ContactPage.formDescription: Please leave an email address for follow-up along with a clear description of the situation. For billing or account issues, include as much concrete context as possible.
ContactPage.noticeBody1: The information you submit is processed for inquiry intake, identity confirmation, response handling, and dispute support.
ContactPage.noticeBody2: General inquiries may be retained for 12 months. Billing, refund, or dispute-related inquiries may be retained for 3 years as required by law.
ContactPage.privacyConsentTitle: [Required] I agree to the collection and use of personal information.
ContactPage.privacyConsentBody:
Items collected: reply email, inquiry category, subject, and inquiry details
Purpose: inquiry intake, identity confirmation, response handling, and dispute support
Retention period: 12 months after resolution for general inquiries; 3 years for inquiries related to billing, refunds, termination, or consumer complaints or disputes where required by applicable law
Right to refuse and disadvantage: You may refuse consent, but in that case we may not be able to accept your inquiry.
ContactPage.policyLinksTitle: Please review the documents below for more details.
ContactPage.alternativeContact: If in-product submission is difficult, you can also contact us at {email}.
ContactPage.toastUnauthorized: Your session expired. Please log in again.
ContactPage.successDescription: The operations team will review it and reply to the email address you provided. Billing or refund inquiries may require additional confirmation depending on the case.
ContactPage.successNotice: The inquiry is also forwarded to the internal operations channel right away, so there is no need to submit it again.

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.subjectTooLong: The subject must be 120 characters or less.
errors.messageTooLong: The inquiry details must be 5000 characters or less.
errors.privacyConsentRequired: You must agree to the privacy notice to submit an inquiry.

ProfileContact.summaryTitle: Leave anything that needs a reply
ProfileContact.summaryDescription: Submit billing, account, or product issues and the operations team will reply by email after review.
ProfileContact.emptyDescription: Once you submit one, you can track its status and response summary here.
ProfileContact.listErrorTitle: Unable to load the inquiry list
ProfileContact.listErrorDescription: Please try again in a moment.
ProfileContact.unauthorizedDescription: If your login expired, please log in again to review your inquiry history.
ProfileContact.answerPending: No response summary has been added yet.

NotFound.title: Page Not Found
NotFound.description: The page you are looking for might have been moved or deleted. Please return to the home page or go to your scoreboard to start again.
NotFound.info: Please double-check the URL you entered. If it's a protected path, you may be redirected to the home page depending on your login status.

Notification.dailyReminderBody: Did you record your lead measures today? Check them now!
Notification.teamCheckinBody: No log for {actionItemName} this week. Give it a go today?

PushNotification.unsupportedIos: Push notifications are only supported on iOS 16.4 or later.
PushNotification.unsupportedBrowser: This browser does not support push notifications. If you are on an iPhone, please add to home screen and try again.
PushNotification.permissionDenied: Notification permission denied. Please allow notifications in browser settings for the best experience.
PushNotification.permissionBlocked: Browser notification permission is blocked. Please allow permissions in settings.
PushNotification.vapidConfigError: Problem setting up notification service. Please contact admin.
PushNotification.subscribeError: Problem setting up notifications. Please try again later.
PushNotification.unsubscribeError: Problem disabling notifications. Please try again later.

InstallGuidePage.copyLinkError: Failed to copy link. Please try again.

Admin.loginDesc: Enter your admin ID and password to access the operating console.

DocsViewer.title: A Dowin document viewer built around planning readability
DocsViewer.description: Browse Dowin docs by topic, status, and linkage instead of raw file names. The first pass is intentionally biased toward reducing planning-document search cost and making side-by-side reading easy.
DocsViewer.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, path, or heading
DocsViewer.empty: No documents match these filters. Reduce the topic or lens scope.

sidebar.topicDescription: Narrow the document set by planning theme first.
sidebar.lensDescription: Quickly separate current, recent, and historical docs.

tree.title: Docs Tree
tree.description: Browse the full document set with a folder-style tree.

compare.title: Read two documents side by side and spot structural differences fast.

detail.title: Document Meta
detail.description: Read context before diving into the body.

onboarding-entry.when: Start here before changing onboarding copy, landing flow, or first-entry paths.
onboarding-entry.why: These docs concentrate the first impression and entry-rule decisions.
onboarding-entry.next: Continue into related dev docs or the current implementation screens.

dashboard-report.when: Read this set before changing dashboard structure or reporting flow.
dashboard-report.why: It contains the core user scenes and performance-review mechanics.
dashboard-report.next: Continue into dashboard/report implementation docs and current pages.

monetization-plan.when: Start here when refining plans, billing, or value proposition.
monetization-plan.why: Pricing and upgrade rationale are already accumulated in planning docs.
monetization-plan.next: Continue into billing APIs and profile/pricing UI.

operations-admin.when: Read these first for admin tools, incidents, or operations workflows.
operations-admin.why: These docs usually carry concrete follow-up work for real operations.
operations-admin.next: Continue into runbooks, admin screens, and operations APIs.

notification-reminder.when: Start here before changing push, reminders, or check-in flows.
notification-reminder.why: These docs directly affect revisit behavior and operating intervention cost.
notification-reminder.next: Continue into notification domain docs and app/WebView flows.

policy-legal.when: Read these before touching policies, terms, or legal notice flows.
policy-legal.why: Copy changes often ripple into billing, contact, and public screens.
policy-legal.next: Continue into actual legal content and public page implementation.

auth-workspace.when: Start here before changing signup, login, or workspace-entry rules.
auth-workspace.why: Small policy differences here can directly change user drop-off.
auth-workspace.next: Continue into auth/workspace docs and route implementations.

platform-infra.when: Read these first when you need API, schema, or infrastructure constraints.
platform-infra.why: These docs often act as anchor references with many cross-links.
platform-infra.next: Continue into related common docs, schema files, or API contracts.

other.when: Use this for documents that do not yet fit a stronger theme.
other.why: You can still navigate them effectively through title and link density.
other.next: Follow the most connected related docs from here.

Integration.disconnectConfirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect?
Integration.disconnectDisclaimerDesc: Disconnecting in Dowin only removes the connection from our database. To completely remove the app's permissions, you must uninstall it directly from your GitHub settings.
Integration.disconnectDisclaimerPath: GitHub → Settings → Applications → Installed GitHub Apps → Dowin → Uninstall
Integration.adminOnly: Only workspace admins can manage integrations.
Integration.howToUseDesc1: Enter the action item code in the GitHub PR title, body, or a commit message included in the PR. (e.g., #DOW-1)
Integration.howToUseDesc2: When the PR is merged, Dowin checks the matching daily log and keeps a link to the PR.
Integration.connectFromProfile: Please connect your GitHub account in your Profile settings first.
Integration.workspaceLinkDisclaimerDesc: Disconnecting here does not remove the GitHub app installation from your account. To completely uninstall the app, please go to your Profile settings.
